title: Distant Shaders Horizons
description: This modpack extends your render distance with seamless, low-performance LOD terrain — so you can finally enjoy breathtaking vistas, huge builds, and distant mountains without lag.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/136389fb2abdd772b312241b29f223b77784cad1.png)Ever wished you could see farther in Minecraft without tanking your FPS? Distant Shaders Quality is the perfect blend of performance optimization and visual enhancement, powered by Distant Horizons.

This modpack extends your render distance with seamless, low-performance LOD terrain — so you can finally enjoy breathtaking vistas, huge builds, and distant mountains without lag.

✨ Features:

🗺️ Distant Horizons integration for extended render distance

⚡ FPS-boosting performance mods for smooth gameplay

🚀 Faster world loading and reduced stuttering

🎨 Compatible with shaders and resource packs

💡 Designed for both low-end and high-end systems
